topic_text: When Press button from Qblinks Qmote, do Call a function using Particle. Press Qmote to call a Spark core function. If you press Qmote by a predefined click pattern, then call a Spark core function.

When Press button from Qblinks Qmote, do Send blink event using blink(1). Press Qmote to send blink(1) a blink event. If you press Qmote by a predefined click pattern, then send your blink(1) a blink event.
When Almond Click is pressed once from Almond, do Activate a scene using Almond. Press Almond Click to activate a scene. Press your Almond Click one and activate a scene on your Almond router.
When Button press from Button widget, do Turn off using WIFIPLUG. Turn off my WIFIPLUG. just tap the do button and let it do it's magic!

When Button press from Button widget, do Turn off then on using WeMo Light Switch. Blink your lights Off & On. Let the family know that dinner is ready by blinking your lights! **Use this button if your lights are already on.

When Button press from Button widget, do Arm the security panel using HomeControl Flex. Arm your security system. Arm your security system with one touch using the Do App(Do has an Apple Watch App too!)

When Button press from Button widget, do Turn off lights using Stack Lighting. Turn Stack lights off. Quickly turn your Stack lights off.

When Button press from Button widget, do Turn on then off using WeMo Light Switch. Blink your lights On & Off. Let the family know that dinner is ready by blinking your lights! **Use this Recipe when your lights are off.

When Button press from Button widget, do Change to random color using Philips Hue. Feeling lucky? Set your light to a random color. This makes for a fun party game, where you have people try to guess the color the lights are going to beOr use it for a variant of "heads or tails" - guess whether the color is going to be "warm" or "cool".

When Button press from Button widget, do Turn off lights using Philips Hue. Turn off the lights. If you're going to bed or leaving the house, use this Applet for a one-button way to turn the lights offSimple, easy, and directThis Applet requires special hardware, a Philips Hue light bulb.
